'''NLZ5-11 Dragon''' was a rare medium class [[Power armor/Legends|powersuit]] model manufactured by [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]]. It provided protection for the head, torso, arms and legs against kinetic and energy attacks.

==Specifications==
The suit provided extra strength to the wearer and came with a sensor system that provided 180 [[Macrobinoculars/Legends|macrobinocular]] vision and a [[Multi-Frequency Targeting and Acquisition System/Legends|Multi-Frequency Targeting and Acquisition System]]. A protective climate controlled [[Body glove/Legends|body glove]] was also standard equipment as was as sealed [[enviro filter]]. In addition a defensive [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] was mounted along side the helmet, twin [[Flamethrower/Legends|flamers]] were mounted on the left forearm armor, and a small missile launcher was mounted on the shoulder armor.

==History==
The armor was originally designed for use by SoroSuub and [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] security forces and was well suited to dealing with large groups of poorly armed individuals and vehicles. The prototype suit and all plans disappeared around the time that SoroSuub allied themselves with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].
